description: Composition Moss green trousers made of 100% cotton, has two front and two rear button-fastening pockets , and a zipper with button fly Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron This smart chino from highlander is an easy, throw-on-and-go style that guarantees weekend cool. Pair it with a white linen shirt and suede boots and revel in the comfort of the cotton fabric. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
